title: doliocarpus coriacea
intro: Doliocarpus coriacea, also known as the "Brazilian gourd" or "gourd vine," is a tropical plant species native to South America. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat digestive issues, such as diarrhea and constipation, due to its high water content and fiber-rich composition. The health benefits of Doliocarpus coriacea include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and act as an antioxidant. Doliocarpus coriacea can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, making it a popular ingredient in traditional medicine and natural remedies.
